nasb.text: Who has woe? Who has sorrow? Who has contentions? Who has complaining? Who has wounds without cause? Who has redness of eyes?

esv.text: Who has woe? Who has sorrow? Who has strife? Who has complaining? Who has wounds without cause? Who has redness of eyes?

cnv.text: 誰有禍患？誰有愁苦？ 誰有紛爭？誰有怨言？ 誰無故受傷？ 誰的眼睛赤紅？

ccb.text: 谁有灾祸？谁有忧伤？ 谁有争吵？谁有怨言？ 谁无故受伤？谁两眼发红？

csbs.text: 谁有祸了？谁有痛苦？ 谁有争执？谁有苦情？ 谁无故受伤？谁的眼目赤红？
